auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Appstle API key sent with the X-API-Key header. Create it in your Appstle admin panel under Settings > API Key Management: https://developers.appstle.com/subscription/authentication

actions.name: get_customer_with_subscriptions
actions.description: Retrieve Appstle customer details including subscription contract information.

customerId.description: Numeric Shopify customer ID, without a gid:// prefix.

cursor.description: Pagination cursor returned by Appstle for subscription contracts.

actions.name: get_valid_subscription_contract_ids
actions.description: Return valid Appstle subscription contract IDs for a Shopify customer.

customerId.description: Numeric Shopify customer ID, without a gid:// prefix.

inputSchema.description: Customer identifier for valid subscription contract ID lookup.

contractIds.description: Numeric Shopify subscription contract IDs returned by Appstle.

outputSchema.description: Valid subscription contract IDs for the customer.

actions.name: list_customer_subscription_details
actions.description: List detailed Appstle subscription contract records for a Shopify customer.

customerId.description: Numeric Shopify customer ID, without a gid:// prefix.

inputSchema.description: Customer identifier for detailed subscription lookup.

outputSchema.description: Detailed subscription contracts for the customer.

actions.name: list_customers_with_subscriptions
actions.description: List customers who have Appstle subscription contracts with optional filters and pagination.

name.description: Filter customers by name. Partial matches are supported.

email.description: Filter customers by exact email address.

activeMoreThanOneSubscription.description: Whether to return only customers with more than one active subscription.

page.description: Zero-based page number to request from Appstle.

size.description: Page size for the customer list.

items.description: One sort directive accepted by Appstle.

sort.description: Spring pageable sort directives such as id,desc.

inputSchema.description: Filters and pagination for listing customers with subscriptions.

email.description: Customer email address returned by Appstle.

activeSubscriptions.description: Number of active subscriptions for the customer.

inActiveSubscriptions.description: Number of inactive subscriptions for the customer.

lifetimeValue.description: Customer lifetime value returned by Appstle.

nextOrderDate.description: Next subscription order timestamp, when present.
